assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Shows --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' which sets Saturday maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific examples of Q4 2025 and Q1 2026 freezes with 30-day periods using --add-maintenance-exclusion commands

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Shows specific November 2025 audit exclusion from Nov 1-30 using --add-maintenance-exclusion commands

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or explain how to handle longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Clearly states in the manual upgrade section that 'it only blocks **auto**-upgrades, not manual ones' and shows manual upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended channel and explains its benefits for compliance, providing maximum control over upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time for each scenario

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or version support lifecycle concerns
